criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: The range and effectiveness of features offered by the app.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use and overall user satisfaction.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which artificial intelligence enhances the app's capabilities.
criteria.sources: App feature lists and technical specifications.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: Number of downloads and active users.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability across different operating systems (iOS, Android, etc.).
